title: orchis coriophora var. cassidea
intro: Orchis coriophora var. cassidea, also known as the Autumn lady's tresses, is a rare and endangered plant species within the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being used as a diuretic, and to treat various health issues such as kidney stones and rheumatism. The health benefits of Orchis coriophora var. cassidea include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and grinding the root, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions.
